title: Trimmer Dual Line Head, M8 x 1.25 Petrol Strimmer Replacement Head for Grass Brush Cutter
features: Good workmanship, solid and durable to use, it's a great accessory for right-hand thread grass brush cutter.
Less 30 second line twist loading - easy load system, no disassembly required.
Small vibration, wear well, durable, sturdy, wearable and long service life.
Suitable for various brush cutter, grass strimmer, universal fit trimmer head etc.
Easy to install: Simply feed the line into the eyelet, give the head a twist and it's ready to go.
description: Features: It's a great accessory for grass brush cutter. Easy to install, convenient to change. Small vibration, wear well and durable. Practical and compact, a great accessory for grass brush cutter. Good workmanship, solid and durable to use. Save the size, easy to install. Sturdy and wearable, long service life. Perfect for domestic, commercial or industrial. Perfect replacement for the broken part. Suitable for brush cutter, grass strimmer, universal fit trimmer head etc. Less 30 second line twist loading--easy load system, no disassembly required. Simply feed the line into the eyelet, give the head a twist and it's ready to go. Make the grass more neatly. Specifcations： Color:Black & Green Material: Plastic & Metal Total Size: approx.9.1x7.5cm(3.58x2.95inch)(DxH) Thread Specification: M8 x 1.25 Item included: 1 x Trimmer Head Compatible With: Fit for Most Strimmer Weight：About 204g Package Content： 1X Trimmer Dual Line Head
